base_image_change.builder_stage: debian:12-slim (unchanged, used to source apt-installed binaries)

b_curl_version.evidence: curl 7.88.1 (aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu) libcurl/7.88.1 OpenSSL/3.0.19 zlib/1.2.13 brotli/1.0.9 zstd/1.5.4 ... EXIT=0
b_curl_version.libssl_abi_verify: PASS (libssl.so.3 already in distroless/cc, OpenSSL/3.0.19 same as debian:12-slim, no ABI drift)

c_curl_https_google.evidence: curl -s https://www.google.com -w '%{http_code}' → 200 EXIT=0 (TLS handshake + cert chain + HTTPS GET all green)

d_tini_pid_watchdog.evidence: tini -- /usr/local/bin/hexa --version → EXIT=0; tini reaping path intact (PPID=1 detection unchanged from production)

e_hexa_run_script.evidence: hexa run /work/foo.hexa → 'sh: 1: dirname: not found' / 'error: interp interpreter not found'. resolve_interp() in self/main.hexa:756 calls exec('test -x ...') which goes through popen('sh -c ...') → needs /bin/sh + GNU coreutils (dirname, basename, printf, test, awk, grep, sed, tr, head, sort, uniq, cut, wc, sha256sum, cp, mv, rm, mkdir, find, ls)
e_hexa_run_script.iteration_attempted: Added /bin/dash + /bin/sh symlink (round-3): shell launches but coreutils still missing

bonus_wget_version.evidence: GNU Wget 1.21.3 built on linux-gnu. EXIT=0

blockers_found.issue: round-1 build smoke: curl/wget exited 127 with libz.so.1, libpcre2-8.so.0, libuuid.so.1 missing — distroless/cc ships libssl/libcrypto/libzstd/libresolv but NOT zlib/pcre2/uuid
round-2 smoke iter-2: hexa run failed because resolve_interp() and dozens of CLI codepaths shell out via exec() → popen('sh -c ...'); distroless has no /bin/sh
blockers_found.fix_applied: COPY --from=builder /bin/dash + /bin/sh symlink (dash is 134KB, pure libc, satisfied by distroless/cc libc.so.6)

blockers_found.issue: round-3 smoke iter-3: shell launches but commands fail with 'sh: 1: dirname: not found'. Hexa CLI exec() patterns rely on dirname, basename, printf, test, cat, awk, grep, sed, tr, head, sort, uniq, cut, wc, sha256sum, cp, mv, rm, mkdir, find, ls (~20 GNU coreutils binaries, ~3MB). Distroless ships none.
blockers_found.fix_NOT_applied: Adding 20+ individual coreutils binaries defeats much of the distroless cleanliness win and creates a maintenance liability for every new CLI exec() site. busybox-static (~1MB single binary) is the natural alternative, but that's a non-trivial scope change deferred to a follow-up cycle.
blockers_found.loc_to_fix_estimate: ~25 LOC if adding individual coreutils; ~5 LOC if adding busybox-static

ω_runner_3_predicted: (1) bridges exec curl/wget — libssl ABI verify needed
(2) tini PPID==1 watchdog — orphan reap test
(3) no shell — RUN apt-install must move to builder stage

ω_runner_4_actual.1_libssl_abi: RESOLVED — distroless/cc ships same OpenSSL 3.0.19 as debian:12-slim, curl HTTPS handshake works
ω_runner_4_actual.2_tini_pid1: RESOLVED — tini binary copied as-is, ENTRYPOINT shape unchanged
ω_runner_4_actual.3_no_shell: PARTIALLY RESOLVED — added /bin/dash; UNCOVERED a deeper dependency chain (B3: ~20 coreutils needed)

blocker_resolution_summary.new_blocker_uncovered: B3 (coreutils requirement) was implicit in 'no shell' but the scope is larger than initially scoped — the hexa CLI runtime is shell-tool-heavy, not just shell-syntax-heavy

final_distroless_dockerfile_loc.comment: Slightly shorter; tradeoff is more COPY lines (transitive lib pull-through) vs the single RUN apt-install in production

recommend_cutover_yes_no.decision: NO (this cycle); CONDITIONAL YES for ω-runner-5
reasoning: Image size win is real and measurable (-69.9MB virtual, -42.4%, matches ω-runner-3 projection).
Bridges (curl/wget) work end-to-end including TLS — primary infra goal achieved.

BUT: hexa run pipeline is broken in current distroless candidate. The CLI exec() pattern requires shell + ~20 coreutils. Cutover would break all hexa-runner workloads except --version and direct curl/wget invocation.

ω-runner-5 plan: switch coreutils strategy from individual binary copy → busybox-static (apt install busybox-static in builder, COPY /bin/busybox + create symlinks for needed applets). Estimated +1-2MB image, +10 LOC. Then re-run smoke e and full bridge_health flight.
recommend_cutover_yes_no.alternative: ω-runner-5b: rewrite hexa CLI exec() sites to use direct syscalls / file_exists native builtins instead of shelling out. Higher LOC, slower, but yields a TRUE distroless image (no shell, no busybox). Defer until exec() refactor is otherwise warranted.

iteration_log.action: initial COPY of expected lib set
iteration_log.result: build OK, smoke a/d PASS, smoke b/c FAIL libz
smoke a/b/c/d PASS, smoke e FAIL no /bin/sh
shell launches, smoke e FAILS no dirname

rollback.production_impact: ZERO (production Dockerfile untouched, no tag overlap, no compose/k8s reference change)
rollback.git_state: Dockerfile.distroless is untracked; rm leaves no git footprint
